title: Crypto Crash Today: Why Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Solana Are All Down Double Digits
description: The crypto market cap stood at $2.53 trillion last Wednesday. As of this morning, it has dropped to $2.25 trillion, with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) testing $61,500 overnight before rebounding to $63K. There’s quite a few reasons for the market plunge. Strategy broke a years-long rule and sold Bitcoin for the first time in nearly four ... Crypto Crash Today: Why Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Solana Are All Down Double Digits
